2381780.name: DAR BattleVerse
2381780.description:
DAR BattleVerse combines the best aspects of your favorite first-person shooter (FPS) games with industry-leading graphics, physics, and gameplay. Experience 8v8 action with custom vehicles, aircraft, gear, and weapons on a silky-smooth server. Your favorite game modes are here, including the new Prop Hunt mode, with custom-built maps, unlockable content, team and group chat, and leaderboard ranking system. Advanced animations allow slide, crouch, prone, and custom lean functions with your fully customizable character.
DAR BattleVerse brings new and exciting possibilities to the gaming world through integration of Web 3 technology. NFT holders can easily connect their crypto wallets to unlock special game features such as the A10 Warthog and Lamborghini (see the BattleVerse website for more info). ** Please note this game is still in early development, we are constantly working and adding new features as well as fixing bugs with new upcoming updates. **
2381780.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
